'''nozhayaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:chaffing|chaffing]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-zh-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:chaffing|chaffing]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| nozhayaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:nozhayithi|nozhayithi]] || [[word:nozhayiji|nozhayiji]] || [[word:nozhayishi|nozhayishi]] || [[word:nozhayiki|nozhayiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:nozhayuthuthu|nozhayuthuthu]] || [[word:nozhayujuju|nozhayujuju]] || [[word:nozhayushushu|nozhayushushu]] || [[word:nozhayukuku|nozhayukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:nozhayuthu|nozhayuthu]] || [[word:nozhayuju|nozhayuju]] || [[word:nozhayushu|nozhayushu]] || [[word:nozhayuku|nozhayuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:nozhayufthuf|nozhayufthuf]] || [[word:nozhayufjuf|nozhayufjuf]] || [[word:nozhayufshuf|nozhayufshuf]] || [[word:nozhayufkuf|nozhayufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:nozhayethe|nozhayethe]] || [[word:nozhayeje|nozhayeje]] || [[word:nozhayeshe|nozhayeshe]] || [[word:nozhayeke|nozhayeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:nozhayothotho|nozhayothotho]] || [[word:nozhayojojo|nozhayojojo]] || [[word:nozhayoshosho|nozhayoshosho]] || [[word:nozhayokoko|nozhayokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:nozhayotho|nozhayotho]] || [[word:nozhayojo|nozhayojo]] || [[word:nozhayosho|nozhayosho]] || [[word:nozhayoko|nozhayoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:nozhayofthof|nozhayofthof]] || [[word:nozhayofjof|nozhayofjof]] || [[word:nozhayofshof|nozhayofshof]] || [[word:nozhayofkof|nozhayofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:nozhayïfthïf|nozhayïfthïf]] || [[word:nozhayïfjïf|nozhayïfjïf]] || [[word:nozhayïfshïf|nozhayïfshïf]] || [[word:nozhayïfkïf|nozhayïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:nozhayïfthïfthïf|nozhayïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:nozhayïfjïfjïf|nozhayïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:nozhayïfshïfshïf|nozhayïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:nozhayïfkïfkïf|nozhayïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:nozhayïfthïf|nozhayïfthïf]] || [[word:nozhayïfjïf|nozhayïfjïf]] || [[word:nozhayïfshïf|nozhayïfshïf]] || [[word:nozhayïfkïf|nozhayïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:nozhayïfthïf|nozhayïfthïf]] || [[word:nozhayïfjïf|nozhayïfjïf]] || [[word:nozhayïfshïf|nozhayïfshïf]] || [[word:nozhayïfkïf|nozhayïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:nozhayæthæ|nozhayæthæ]] || [[word:nozhayæjæ|nozhayæjæ]] || [[word:nozhayæshæ|nozhayæshæ]] || [[word:nozhayækæ|nozhayækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:nozhayathatha|nozhayathatha]] || [[word:nozhayajaja|nozhayajaja]] || [[word:nozhayashasha|nozhayashasha]] || [[word:nozhayakaka|nozhayakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:nozhayatha|nozhayatha]] || [[word:nozhayaja|nozhayaja]] || [[word:nozhayasha|nozhayasha]] || [[word:nozhayaka|nozhayaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:nozhayafthaf|nozhayafthaf]] || [[word:nozhayafjaf|nozhayafjaf]] || [[word:nozhayafshaf|nozhayafshaf]] || [[word:nozhayafkaf|nozhayafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:nozhayasha|nozhayasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:nozhayshësha|nozhayshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:nozhayrosha|nozhayrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:nozhaymusha|nozhaymusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:nozhayasha|nozhayasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonozhaynkshësha|gonozhaynkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonozhaynkrosha|gonozhaynkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonozhaynkmusha|gonozhaynkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gonozhaynkyasha|gonozhaynkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:nozhazhayasha|nozhazhayasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:nozhazhayshësha|nozhazhayshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:nozhazhayrosha|nozhazhayrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:nozhazhaymusha|nozhazhaymusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:nozhazhayasha|nozhazhayasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonozhazhaynkshësha|gonozhazhaynkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonozhazhaynkrosha|gonozhazhaynkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonozhazhaynkmusha|gonozhazhaynkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gonozhazhaynkyasha|gonozhazhaynkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:nezhæyasha|nezhæyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:nezhæyshësha|nezhæyshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:nezhæyrosha|nezhæyrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:nezhæymusha|nezhæymusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:nezhæyasha|nezhæyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonezhæynkshësha|gonezhæynkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonezhæynkrosha|gonezhæynkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonezhæynkmusha|gonezhæynkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gonezhæynkyasha|gonezhæynkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:nozhfayasha|nozhfayasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:nozhfayshësha|nozhfayshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:nozhfayrosha|nozhfayrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:nozhfaymusha|nozhfaymusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:nozhfayasha|nozhfayasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonozhfaynkshësha|gonozhfaynkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonozhfaynkrosha|gonozhfaynkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonozhfaynkmusha|gonozhfaynkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gonozhfaynkyasha|gonozhfaynkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|691fcb1}}
